name: Dr Isaiah Oino
title: Senior Lecturer in Accounting
expertise_topics: I. (2022) Sustainability and its Value: Does Corporate Social Responsibility Score have an impact on financial Access? A review of Chinese Manufacturing Firms: management revue - Socio-Economic Studies (Accepted article: In print) [ ABS Rating 2]

biography: Dr Isaiah Oino is an accountant with practical experience in the industry and over 10 years’ experience in delivering accounting modules in various Universities in the UK and professional courses such as ACCA. Current serving as a Chairman of Stoke UK Diaspora Sacco, a boutique financial institution. Published widely in internationally ranked journals and supervised PhD students in behavioral finance to completion.
